notes: GPT-OSS MXFP4 fused-MoE kernel for RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell (sm120), scored through the FusedMoE block seam (no sglang fork, no framework mode). prepare = CUTLASS [up;gate] MXFP4 repack + interleaved scales + biases; forward = MXFP8-act-quant + flashinfer cutlass_fused_moe (autotuned). Matches the hand-forked flashinfer_mxfp4 backend at TP=4.
